texto: Oh for a book and a shady nook,Either indoors or out,with the green leaves whispering overhead,or the street cries all about.Where I may read at all my easeboth of the new and old,For a jolly good book whereon to lookis better to me than gold
explicacao: Citação de John Wilson sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Oh for a book and a shady nook,Either indoors or out,with the green leaves whispering overhead,or…” articula reflexao, books, reading em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reading.
